# Prompt Template: Add Glossary Items

```text
Open a PR that applies `.github/ai-docs/skills/glossary-items.md` to add glossary entries to `source/aa-bookends/glossary.ptx` for the following section files:

- [section file]

Notes:
- Review the current glossary and match its style and format.
- Keep each item concise and student-facing.
- Use displayed math for important mathematical statements that are awkward inline.
- Do not add duplicate entries.
- Do not attempt a full PreTeXt build if external service/firewall errors are unavoidable; instead validate XML structure and summarize limitations.
```
